InitiativeChat.Name: Show initiative roll in chat
InitiativeChat.Hint: If enabled, initiative rolls will be posted to the chat log.

ApplyEncumbranceRules.Name: Apply Encumbrance Rules
ApplyEncumbranceRules.Hint: If enabled, encumbrance rules (Guard and Speed penalties) will be automatically applied based on Armor Rating. The state icon will still be shown even if this is disabled.

PlayerFacingInitiative.Name: Player-Facing Initiative Rolls
PlayerFacingInitiative.Hint: When enabled, players roll their own initiative at the start of each round instead of it being automatic.

RestrictMovementAction.Name: Restrict Movement Action
RestrictMovementAction.Hint: If enabled, movement is only allowed after taking a Move or Vault action. If disabled, tokens can move freely.

RestrictHUDActions.Name: Restrict Actions per Turn
RestrictHUDActions.Hint: If enabled, HUD actions (Defend, Help, etc.) can only be used once per turn unless otherwise specified.

RestrictAPFocusUsage.Name: Restrict AP and Focus action usage
RestrictAPFocusUsage.Hint: If enabled, the system enforces AP and Focus costs. If disabled, actions can be used without sufficient points.

DisregardRangeOnAttack.Name: Disregard Range on Attack
DisregardRangeOnAttack.Hint: When enabled, attacking out-of-range targets will show a warning but still allow the attack to proceed.

AllowOutOfTurnMovement.Name: Allow Movement Out of Turn
AllowOutOfTurnMovement.Hint: When enabled, players can move their tokens even when it's not their combat phase. Movement out of turn is not tracked against their movement budget.

ConfirmItemTransfer.Name: Confirm Item Transfers
ConfirmItemTransfer.Hint: If enabled, you will be prompted to accept or reject items transferred to you by other players.

HideCreatureDamageRolls.Name: Hide Creature Damage Rolls
HideCreatureDamageRolls.Hint: If enabled, damage rolls made by creatures (creature actors) will be whispered to the GM and the roller only.

GroupCheckFullParty.Name: Group Check always use full party
GroupCheckFullParty.Hint: If enabled, group checks will always include all party members without showing a selection popup.

RestrictHavenEditToLeader.Name: Restrict Haven Edit to Leader
RestrictHavenEditToLeader.Hint: Only the party leader can add or remove buildings and projects in Haven.

BypassHavenBuildingLimits.Name: Bypass Haven Building Limits
BypassHavenBuildingLimits.Hint: If enabled, Havens will not be restricted by the Building Limit or Build Slots defined in the progression table.

EnableRetreatDialog.Name: Enable Retreat Dialog
EnableRetreatDialog.Hint: If enabled, the GM will be prompted to Continue or Retreat at the start of each new round after the Peril roll. If disabled, rounds proceed normally.

ShowPerilInChat.Name: Show Peril roll in chat
ShowPerilInChat.Hint: If enabled, the Peril roll at the start of each round will be posted to the chat log for all players to see.

AutoEndCombatOnRetreat.Name: Auto-end combat on successful retreat
AutoEndCombatOnRetreat.Hint: If enabled, combat will automatically end when the party successfully retreats. If disabled, only a message is posted and the GM must end combat manually.

PromptNonCombatSparkShadow.Name: Prompt Spark/Shadow Picker for Non-Combat Rolls
PromptNonCombatSparkShadow.Hint: If enabled, the GM and players will be prompted to pick their Spark and Shadow after a non-combat skill or attribute roll. If disabled, the prompt is skipped and the amount of sparks and shadows rolled is shown in the chat card.

AutomateTravelTracker.Name: Automate Camp Rolls
AutomateTravelTracker.Hint: If enabled, resolving a camp will automatically prompt players to roll for their chosen camp actions. If disabled, only the chosen actions are shown in chat without prompting.

ClockSize.Name: Clock Size (px)
ClockSize.Hint: The width and height of all clocks in the system (Projects, Events, and Injuries).

FontSizeBase.Name: Base Font Size (px)
FontSizeBase.Hint: The base font size for the entire system. All other font sizes will scale proportionally.

ShowStatusEffectsOnTokens.Name: Show status effects on tokens
ShowStatusEffectsOnTokens.Hint: If enabled, selected status effect icons from Effect items will be displayed as overlay icons on active tokens.
